name: Vineet Sharma
quote: Onboarding two talented WinVinaya candidates was a fantastic experience from interview to offer — the team's support throughout made all the difference. This partnership is just getting started.

name: Sumukha Rao
quote: WinVinaya doesn't just do social work — they build genuine careers for differently-abled talent. People from Shiva's organisation continue to deliver at or above the level of any other hire.

name: Harikumar
quote: WinVinaya's constant support and encouragement helped me reach my goals. They trained me in Java, SQL and Soft Skills, and I went on to join Caterpillar as an Associate Engineer.
